issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
The skill is vendor-locked to wagmi and viem, limiting its applicability to other libraries or frameworks.

scenarios.name: wagmi v2 multi-chain config with provider tree
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses v2 functional connectors (injected/walletConnect) and wraps with both WagmiProvider and QueryClientProvider; baseline uses outdated v1 class connectors and omits the React Query provider entirely.

scenarios.name: ERC-20 balance display and transfer with receipt tracking
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses v2 hooks (useReadContract, useWriteContract, useWaitForTransactionReceipt) with erc20Abi from viem; baseline uses v1 API hooks and lacks transaction receipt confirmation tracking.
